title: linum hirsutum subsp. glabrescens
intro: Linum hirsutum subsp. glabrescens, also known as flax or linseed, is an annual plant species belonging to the family Linaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its oil, which is rich in alpha-linolenic acid and has anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and emollient properties. The health benefits of Linum hirsutum subsp. glabrescens include reducing symptoms of eczema and other skin conditions, improving heart health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Linum hirsutum subsp. glabrescens include oil capsules, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to support skin and overall health.
